hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git push.*--force($| )|git push.*-f([^i]|$)|git reset --hard' && ! echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q 'force-with-lease'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Destructive git operation. Bug-review never force-pushes or hard resets.' >&2; exit 1; fi

CHANGED=$(git diff --stat 2>/dev/null | tail -1); FILES=$(echo "$CHANGED" | grep -oE '[0-9]+ file' | grep -oE '[0-9]+'); LINES=$(echo "$CHANGED" | grep -oE '[0-9]+ insertion' | grep -oE '[0-9]+'); if [ "${FILES:-0}" -gt 1 ] || [ "${LINES:-0}" -gt 20 ]; then echo "WARNING: Autofix scope exceeded (${FILES:-0} files, ${LINES:-0} insertions). Verify the change is minimal." >&2; fi
